creator: DtxdF@disroot.org
text:
Created attachment 251404
vis-0.9.patch

Description:

* Change WWW (Seems to be outdated).
* Remove all optimization flags from the configure script.
* Change /usr/local to %%PREFIX%%.
* Change /etc to %%ETCDIR%%.
* Use a more up-to-date test suite.
    
ChangeLog: https://github.com/martanne/vis/blob/v0.9/CHANGELOG.md

QA:

* portlint: OK (looks fine.)
* testport: OK (poudriere: 14.1-RELEASE, amd64, LPEG NLS TRE tested)
